loop1.title: Voltage Monitor (Real-Time)
loop1.note: Showing live voltage trends and KPIs — threshold limits and y-axis ticks are structural defaults not measured by this meter.

loop1.title: Current Monitor (Real-Time)
loop1.note: Showing real-time current trends (R/Y/B phases, Neutral, Max/Min/Avg) — current high/low thresholds are omitted because the asset's nameplate rated current is unknown.
